creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
On ASUS A8N32-SLI and an older ASUS P4P800 based FreeBSD boxes ACPI does not
show thermal zones nor fan speeds! Both boxes utilize AMI BIOS. On ASUS
A8N-SLI Deluxe (AWARD BIOS) ACPI shows up with thermal zones!

OpenBSD do show ACPI thermal zones and fan speed, so it is a obviously
FreeBSD problem.
